content.text:
<plugin_info kind="matched_installed">
display_name: Supabase
description: Access your Supabase projects and perform tasks like managing tables, fetching config, and querying data.
skills:
  - supabase-postgres-best-practices: Postgres performance optimization and best practices from Supabase. Use this skill when writing, reviewing, or optimizing Postgres queries, schema designs, or database configurations.
  - supabase: Use when doing ANY task involving Supabase. Triggers: Supabase products (Database, Auth, Edge Functions, Realtime, Storage, Vectors, Cron, Queues); client libraries and SSR integrations (supabase-js, @supabase/ssr) in Next.js, React, SvelteKit, Astro, Remix; auth issues (login, logout, sessions, JWT, cookies, getSession, getUser, getClaims, RLS); Supabase CLI or MCP server; schema changes, migrations, security audits, Postgres extensions (pg_graphql, pg_cron, pg_vector).
mcp_servers:
  - supabase
</plugin_info>
<user_query>
Explore this Next.js project at /Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing and return:
1. The top-level folder structure (app/, components/, lib/, etc.)
2. What's in app/ - all routes and page files
3. Contents of lib/store.ts if it exists
4. Any existing database/Supabase schema files (migrations, schema.sql, types)
5. package.json dependencies (just the relevant ones - next, supabase, xlsx, pdf parsing libs)
6. Any existing invoice-related components or API routes
7. The .env.local or .env file structure (just key names, not values)
8. Any existing API routes under app/api/

Be thorough - look at file names and first 20-30 lines of key files.
</user_query>

I'll map the project structure and key files you listed — starting with the top-level layout and `app/` routes.

[REDACTED]

input.final_summary: InvoiceFlow is a GST invoicing Next.js 15 app (not a design canvas). It uses Supabase Postgres, has no lib/store.ts, no xlsx/PDF parsing libs, and PDF export is browser print-based. Schema lives in supabase/schema.sql plus API migration routes.

content.text:
Here is a thorough exploration of `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing`:

---

## 1. Top-Level Folder Structure

| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `app/` | Next.js App Router pages, layouts, API routes |
| `components/` | React UI (invoice forms, dashboard, template editor, shadcn `ui/`) |
| `lib/` | DB layer, Supabase auth, types, email, GST API, utilities |
| `supabase/` | `schema.sql` + CLI temp metadata |
| `public/` | Static assets (`icon.svg`, placeholders) |
| `scripts/` | `generate-password-hash.js` |
| `styles/` | `globals.css` (duplicate of `app/globals.css` pattern) |
| `Design_skill_reference/` | Design reference CSV data |
| `cursor-design-personas/` | Separate CLI/skills subproject |
| Config | `package.json`, `pnpm-lock.yaml`, `next.config.mjs`, `middleware.ts`, `tsconfig.json`, `components.json`, `postcss.config.mjs` |

**Not present:** `lib/store.ts` (no Zustand store — this is an invoicing app, not the design-canvas project described in some project rules).

---

## 2. `app/` — Routes and Page Files

### Public / Auth
| Route | File |
|-------|------|
| `/` | `app/page.tsx` — InvoiceFlow landing page |
| `/login` | `app/login/page.tsx` |
| `/reset-password` | `app/reset-password/page.tsx` |
| `/onboarding` | `app/onboarding/page.tsx` |
| `/accept-invite/[token]` | `app/accept-invite/[token]/page.tsx` |
| `/auth/login` | `app/auth/login/page.tsx` |
| `/auth/verify-email` | `app/auth/verify-email/page.tsx` |
| `/auth/callback` | `app/auth/callback/route.ts` (route handler) |

### Dashboard (`/dashboard/*`, protected by `middleware.ts`)
| Route | File |
|-------|------|
| `/dashboard` | `app/dashboard/page.tsx` |
| `/dashboard/layout.tsx` | Shared dashboard shell |
| `/dashboard/invoices` | `app/dashboard/invoices/page.tsx` |
| `/dashboard/invoices/new` | `app/dashboard/invoices/new/page.tsx` |
| `/dashboard/invoices/[id]` | `app/dashboard/invoices/[id]/page.tsx` |
| `/dashboard/invoices/[id]/pdf` | `app/dashboard/invoices/[id]/pdf/page.tsx` |
| `/dashboard/invoices/[id]/pdf/print-button.tsx` | Client print button |
| `/dashboard/invoices/templates` | `app/dashboard/invoices/templates/page.tsx` |
| `/dashboard/clients` | `app/dashboard/clients/page.tsx` |
| `/dashboard/clients/new` | `app/dashboard/clients/new/page.tsx` |
| `/dashboard/clients/[id]/edit` | `app/dashboard/clients/[id]/edit/page.tsx` |
| `/dashboard/payments` | `app/dashboard/payments/page.tsx` |
| `/dashboard/payments/new` | `app/dashboard/payments/new/page.tsx` |
| `/dashboard/purchases` | `app/dashboard/purchases/page.tsx` |
| `/dashboard/reconciliation` | `app/dashboard/reconciliation/page.tsx` |
| `/dashboard/gst-report` | `app/dashboard/gst-report/page.tsx` |
| `/dashboard/account-summary` | `app/dashboard/account-summary/page.tsx` |
| `/dashboard/settings` | `app/dashboard/settings/page.tsx` |

### Root layout
- `app/layout.tsx`, `app/globals.css`

---

## 3. `lib/store.ts`

**Does not exist.** State is handled via:
- Server-side SQL queries in page components
- Client component local `useState` (forms, lists)
- Supabase session cookies via `middleware.ts` / `lib/supabase-auth.ts`

---

## 4. Database / Supabase Schema Files

### Primary schema
- **`/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/supabase/schema.sql`** — Full "InvoiceFlow" schema

**Tables defined:**
- `organizations`, `org_members`, `profiles`, `clients`, `invoices`, `payments`, `bank_transactions`, `purchases`, `gst_sync_logs`, `gst_ledger_entries`
- Indexes + seed data for a default org/profile

### Runtime schema management (API routes, not migration files)
| Route | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `app/api/init-db/route.ts` | Drops/recreates all core tables if org doesn't exist |
| `app/api/migrate-invoice-templates/route.ts` | Creates `invoice_templates` table (JSONB config) |
| `app/api/update-schema-v2/route.ts` | Adds GSTIN, bank fields, `tax_rate` columns |
| `app/api/update-db-schema/route.ts` | Older schema patch route |
| `app/api/seed-data/route.ts` | Seeds sample data |

### TypeScript types (manual, not generated)
- **`lib/types.ts`** — `Profile`, `Client`, `Invoice`, `Payment`, `BankTransaction`, `Purchase`, `Organization`, `OrgMember`
- **No** `database.types.ts` or Supabase CLI-generated types

### DB access layer
- **`lib/db.ts`** — Tagged-template SQL via Supabase `exec_sql` RPC (service role key), not direct `postgres` driver despite `postgres` being in `package.json`

### Supabase migrations folder
- **No** `supabase/migrations/` directory — only `schema.sql` and `.temp/` CLI metadata

---

## 5. Relevant `package.json` Dependencies

| Package | Version | Notes |
|---------|---------|-------|
| `next` | `15.5.9` | App Router |
| `@supabase/supabase-js` | `^2.108.2` | Supabase client |
| `@supabase/ssr` | `^0.12.0` | Cookie-based auth in middleware |
| `@neondatabase/serverless` | `latest` | Listed but DB layer uses Supabase RPC |
| `postgres` | `^3.4.9` | Installed, not primary DB path |
| `@stackframe/stack` | `2.8.80` | Stack Auth (legacy/alternate auth paths) |
| `resend` | `^6.14.0` | Invoice email sending |
| `recharts` | `latest` | Dashboard charts |
| `react` / `react-dom` | `19.1.0` | |

**Not installed:**
- `xlsx` / `sheetjs` — no Excel parsing
- `pdf-parse`, `jspdf`, `pdfkit`, `puppeteer` — no server-side PDF generation

**PDF approach:** Browser print-to-PDF via `/dashboard/invoices/[id]/pdf` + `PrintButton` component.

---

## 6. Invoice-Related Components and API Routes

### Components (`/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components/`)
| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `invoice-form.tsx` | Create invoice form (CGST/SGST, HSN, client select) |
| `invoice-list.tsx` | Invoice table with status badges, mark-paid modal, PDF links |
| `invoice-view.tsx` | Single invoice detail, send email, print/PDF |
| `invoice-status-chart.tsx` | Dashboard status breakdown chart |
| `recent-invoices.tsx` | Dashboard recent invoices widget |
| `template-editor.tsx` | Invoice template visual editor |
| `template-preview.tsx` | Classic template preview |
| `canvas-template-editor.tsx` | Canvas-based template editor |
| `canvas-template-preview.tsx` | Canvas template render (used on PDF page) |
| `template-style-panel.tsx` | Template styling controls |
| `template-field-panel.tsx` | Template field configuration |
| `templates-page-client.tsx` | Templates page client wrapper |

### Supporting lib
| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `lib/template-defaults.ts` | `TemplateConfig`, starter templates |
| `lib/email.ts` | `sendInvoiceEmail()` via Resend |
| `lib/utils/number-to-words.ts` | Amount in words on PDF |

### Invoice API routes
| Route | Methods | Purpose |
|-------|---------|---------|
| `/api/invoices` | GET, POST, PUT, PATCH | CRUD for invoices |
| `/api/invoices/[id]/send` | POST | Email invoice to client |
| `/api/invoice-templates` | GET, POST, PUT, DELETE | Template CRUD + `?active` for default |
| `/api/migrate-invoice-templates` | GET | One-time table creation |
| `/api/template-backgrounds` | POST | Upload template background to Supabase Storage |

---

## 7. `.env.local` Structure (key names only)

**Present in `.env.local`:**
- `DATABASE_URL`
- `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL`
- `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY`
- `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY`
- `VERCEL_OIDC_TOKEN`

**Referenced in code but not in `.env.local` (may be set on Vercel or missing locally):**
- `NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL` — invoice/invite links (defaults to `http://localhost:3000`)
- `RESEND_API_KEY` — required for sending invoice emails
- `NEXT_PUBLIC_STACK_PROJECT_ID` — Stack Auth
- `STACK_SECRET_SERVER_KEY` — Stack Auth
- `GST_API_BASE_URL` — GST API sandbox (optional)

**No** `.env` or `.env.example` file found.

---

## 8. All API Routes under `app/api/`

| Route | Methods | Summary |
|-------|---------|---------|
| `/api/account-summary` | GET | Account summary data |
| `/api/auth/check` | GET | Auth status check (Stack Auth) |
| `/api/bank-transactions` | GET, POST | Bank statement transactions |
| `/api/categorize` | GET, POST | Transaction categorization |
| `/api/categorize/learn` | POST | Learn categorization rules |
| `/api/clients` | GET, POST, PUT, DELETE | Client CRUD |
| `/api/gst/credentials` | GET, POST, PUT | GST portal credentials |
| `/api/gst/mock` | POST | Mock GST data |
| `/api/gst/sync` | GET, POST | GST sync |
| `/api/gst-report` | GET | GST report export |
| `/api/import-figma-data` | GET | Seed invoices from Figma/PDF reference data |
| `/api/init-db` | GET | Initialize database schema |
| `/api/invoice-templates` | GET, POST, PUT, DELETE | Invoice template management |
| `/api/invoices` | GET, POST, PUT, PATCH | Invoice CRUD |
| `/api/invoices/[id]/send` | POST | Send invoice email |
| `/api/migrate-invoice-templates` | GET | Create `invoice_templates` table |
| `/api/org/invite` | GET, POST, DELETE | Team invite management |
| `/api/payments` | GET, POST | Payment records |
| `/api/profile` | GET, POST, PUT | Business profile |
| `/api/purchases` | GET, POST, DELETE | Input GST purchases |
| `/api/reconcile` | POST, DELETE | Bank reconciliation |
| `/api/seed-data` | GET | Seed sample data |
| `/api/template-backgrounds` | POST | Upload template background image |
| `/api/update-db-schema` | GET | Legacy schema patch |
| `/api/update-schema-v2` | GET | Schema v2 patch |

---

## Key Takeaways

1. **This is InvoiceFlow** — a GST invoicing SaaS for Indian freelancers, not the design-canvas platform from some project rules.
2. **Auth:** Supabase SSR (middleware protects `/dashboard/*`); Stack Auth code still present in `lib/auth*.ts` and `/api/auth/check`.
3. **No `lib/store.ts`** — no Zustand global state.
4. **Schema is split** between `supabase/schema.sql`, inline SQL in `init-db`, and one-off migration API routes (no formal migration history).
5. **No xlsx or PDF parsing libraries** — PDF = browser print; bank uploads likely CSV (see `bank-statement-upload.tsx`).
6. **Template system is substantial** — canvas + classic editors, JSONB `invoice_templates` table, Supabase Storage for backgrounds.

[REDACTED]
